name: Passage BIO, Inc.
summary: PARTI Overview We are a clinical stage genetic medicines company focused on improving the lives of patients with neurodegenerative diseases. Our primary focus is the development and advancement of cutting-edge, one-time gene therapies designed to target critical underlying pathologies in these conditions.
